pages.text: A spellstone tied to fire, lava, and the Nether.$(br2)It grants strong adaptation to extreme heat and allows the bearer to move through lava.
pages.title: Blazing Core

pages.text: While wearing the Blazing Core, you are immune to most ordinary fire damage and gain temporary protection in lava.$(br2)It also improves visibility in lava and allows you to swim through it.
pages.title: Lava Adaptation

pages.text: Do not mistake resistance for invulnerability.$(br2)If the Blazing Core is pushed too far, the bearer may still suffer the consequences of fire and lava.$(br2)Damage from aquatic creatures also becomes more dangerous.
pages.title: Overheat
